data.title: Mirriad Advertising Sees Major Shift in Shareholder Voting Rights
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Mirriad Advertising ( (GB:MIRI) ) has provided an announcement.

Mirriad Advertising PLC has announced a significant change in its shareholder structure, with Rathbones Investment Management Ltd and related entities reducing their voting rights from 14.99% to 0.91%. This reduction in holdings may impact the company’s governance and influence within the market, as major stakeholders adjust their positions.

More about Mirriad Advertising

Mirriad Advertising PLC operates in the advertising industry, specializing in in-content advertising solutions. The company focuses on providing innovative advertising services that integrate brands seamlessly into video content, enhancing viewer engagement and brand visibility.

data.title: Modern Chinese Medicine Group Eyes Expansion with New Share Subscription
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Modern Chinese Medicine Group Co. Ltd. ( (HK:1643) ) has shared an announcement.

Modern Chinese Medicine Group Co., Ltd. announced plans to use proceeds from a new share subscription for investment and business development, with a focus on acquiring a traditional Chinese medicine manufacturer in Hong Kong. The company aims to enhance its research and development capabilities and expand its sales network. Despite preliminary discussions, no binding agreement has been made, and the company is exploring other opportunities. The company plans to utilize its cash reserves for various strategic initiatives, including establishing a healthcare food factory, setting up a research team, and expanding distribution networks.

More about Modern Chinese Medicine Group Co. Ltd.

Modern Chinese Medicine Group Co., Ltd. operates in the traditional Chinese medicine industry, focusing on the development and distribution of Chinese medicine products. The company is involved in investment and business development within this sector, aiming to expand its market presence in Hong Kong and overseas.

data.title: Mynaric Announces Key Milestones in Laser Communications Technology
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Mynaric AG ( (DE:M0YN) ) has shared an update.

On June 5, 2025, Mynaric announced significant advancements in its laser communications technology, including the delivery of over 100 CONDOR Mk3 optical communications terminals and the development of the next-generation CONDOR Mk3.1 terminal. The new terminal, designed for higher data rates and efficiency, is set to support both government and commercial satellite constellations. Despite earlier delays due to supplier shortages, Mynaric has ramped up production, achieving triple-digit yields and confirming its restructuring plan to enhance profitability and financial stability.

The most recent analyst rating on (DE:M0YN) stock is a Buy with a EUR10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mynaric AG stock, see the DE:M0YN Stock Forecast page.

More about Mynaric AG

Mynaric is a leader in the industrial revolution of laser communications, producing optical communications terminals for air, space, and mobile applications. Their technology enables ultra-high data rates and secure, long-distance data transmission between moving objects for wireless terrestrial, mobility, airborne, and space-based applications. The company is headquartered in Munich, Germany, with additional operations in Los Angeles, California.

Average Trading Volume: 22,035

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €1.72M

data.title: Roma Green Finance Limited Closes Follow-On Offering, Strengthens Market Position
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Roma Green Finance Limited ( (ROMA) ) has issued an update.

On June 5, 2025, Roma Green Finance Limited announced the closing of its self-directed follow-on public offering (FPO), raising approximately US$6.84 million in net proceeds. The offering included the sale of 11 million ordinary shares and 33 million common warrants, with proceeds earmarked for branding and marketing, investment in ESG projects, and working capital. This follows a previous IPO and a self-underwritten follow-on offering, reflecting the company’s ongoing efforts to bolster its industry presence and financial stability.

More about Roma Green Finance Limited

Roma Green Finance Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company, operating from Hong Kong. It specializes in providing customized ESG, corporate governance, and comprehensive sustainability and climate change solutions, including risk management solutions, to its clients. The company focuses on strengthening its market position in Hong Kong, Singapore, and the PRC.

data.title: Fu Yu Corporation Faces Financial Impact from Arbitration Ruling
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Fu Yu Corporation Limited ( (SG:F13) ) has provided an announcement.

Fu Yu Corporation Limited, through its subsidiary Fu Yu Supply Chain Solutions Pte. Ltd., has been involved in arbitration proceedings with Evertree. The arbitral tribunal has ruled in favor of Evertree, awarding them approximately S$1.67 million, including interest and legal costs. This decision will materially impact Fu Yu’s financial statements for the year ended December 2024, as the company had previously provisioned S$1.24 million for this claim.

More about Fu Yu Corporation Limited

An announcement from Happy Belly Food Group ( (TSE:HBFG) ) is now available.

Happy Belly Food Group’s Rosie’s Burgers has signed its first franchise agreement in Halifax, Nova Scotia, marking its entry into Atlantic Canada. This expansion is part of a broader national growth strategy, leveraging both corporate store development and an asset-light franchise model to accelerate growth across Canada. The agreement underscores the company’s robust franchise support system and positions Rosie’s Burgers for long-term success in a market with strong demographic and economic potential.

Happy Belly Food Group Inc. is a leading consolidator of emerging food brands, focusing on expanding its portfolio through franchise agreements and corporate store development. The company operates in the quick-service restaurant industry, with a market focus on providing high-quality, fast-casual dining experiences through brands like Rosie’s Burgers.
